notes: Internal canonical package for Limiar OS validation.
Contains only data explicitly provided by the 2026-07-02 catalog rules prompt.
Do not infer Cyberpunk RED book rules from this file; extend only when explicit source data is provided.

Evidence Collection.reason: Not an official skill in the current system.
Evidence Collection.canonicalAction: Convert to contextual effect or remove automatic bonus.

Disguise.reason: Not an official skill in the current system.
Disguise.canonicalAction: Convert to contextual effect, or split into Acting and Wardrobe & Style only when an explicit rule says so.

slotRules.description: Some cyberoptics require two paired Cybereyes and must consume slots in both eyes.
Most paired cyberleg options require two Cyberlegs and must be installed in two different Cyberlegs; Humanity Loss is paid for each option instance unless the item explicitly says otherwise.
Cyberware slots are separate by location/category.

Big Knucks.skillNote: Prompt allows Brawling or Melee Weapon according to current engine design, but prefers Brawling for punch-like attacks.

special: Can deliver Poison or Biotoxin when loaded

Dartgun Eye.weaponSkill: Exotic or Shoulder Arms/Handgun according to existing engine support

Popup Melee Weapon.concealableNote: Concealable even if selected weapon is not normally concealable.

Popup Ranged Weapon.concealableNote: Concealable even if selected weapon is not normally concealable.

requires: two Grafted Muscle and Bone Lace instances

Low Light / Infrared / UV.senseMode: Ignore penalties due to darkness, smoke, fog, and similar conditions.

conditionalAttackBonus.condition: Aimed Shot against targets 51m/yd or farther away

Skate Foot.movementMode: Increases movement by 6m/yd only when using Run Action on suitable surface.

empProtection.scope: parent cyberlimb and installed options only

faqRules: Cyberweapons like Scratchers, Rippers, Wolvers, Slice 'N Dice, Cybersnake, Talon Foot, Big Knucks, and Vampyres cannot be bought as Poor/Excellent variants like normal weapons unless a specific upgrade or Tech rule handles it.
Popup Melee Weapon can contain Light, Medium, or Heavy Melee Weapons, including Exotic/Poor/Excellent if the selected installed weapon has that quality.
If an Implanted Linear Frame is disabled by EMP, BODY and Death Save drop back to non-frame values while disabled, but HP boost remains.
Cyberware slots are separate by location/category.

NEURAL-LINK.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
NEURAL-LINK.name: Neural Link
NEURAL-LINK.desc: sistema neural artificial necessario para plugs neurais e subdermal grip; possui 5 option slots.

BD-REC.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
BD-REC.name: Braindance Recorder

effects.value: records user experience to memory chip or external device

BD-REC.desc: grava experiencias do usuario em chip ou dispositivo externo.

CHIP-SOCKET.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
CHIP-SOCKET.name: Chipware Socket
CHIP-SOCKET.desc: soquete instalado na nuca; necessario para usar chipware.

INTERFACE-PLUGS.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
INTERFACE-PLUGS.name: Interface Plugs
INTERFACE-PLUGS.desc: plugs no pulso ou cabeca para conexao com maquinas.

KERENZIKOV.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
KERENZIKOV.name: Kerenzikov
KERENZIKOV.desc: speedware que adiciona +2 a iniciativa; apenas um speedware pode estar instalado.

SANDEVISTAN.name: Sandevistan

MEM-CHIP.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
MEM-CHIP.name: Memory Chip

OLF-BOOST.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
OLF-BOOST.name: Olfactory Boost

PAIN-EDITOR.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables

SKILL-CHIP.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
SKILL-CHIP.name: Skill Chip

effects.value: 400x magnification

UNDERBARREL-GL.desc: lancador de granada sob o cano de arma compativel.

AMMO-SHELL.desc: shell para shotgun; comportamento de cone/area fica para fase de combate.

BODYWEIGHT-SUIT.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Armor tables
BODYWEIGHT-SUIT.name: Bodyweight Suit
BODYWEIGHT-SUIT.desc: SP 11, sem penalidade; suporta Interface Plugs e slots de Cyberdeck.

MEDIUM-ARMORJACK.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Armor tables
MEDIUM-ARMORJACK.name: Medium Armorjack
MEDIUM-ARMORJACK.desc: SP 12, penalidade -2 para REF, DEX e MOVE.

HEAVY-ARMORJACK.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Armor tables
HEAVY-ARMORJACK.name: Heavy Armorjack
HEAVY-ARMORJACK.desc: SP 13, penalidade -2 para REF, DEX e MOVE.

FLAK.name: Flak
FLAK.desc: SP 15, penalidade -4 para REF, DEX e MOVE.

LIGHT-METALGEAR.name: Light Metalgear
LIGHT-METALGEAR.desc: SP 16, penalidade -3 para REF, DEX e MOVE.

METALGEAR.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Armor tables
METALGEAR.name: Metalgear
METALGEAR.desc: SP 18, penalidade -4 para REF, DEX e MOVE.

BULLETPROOF-SHIELD.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Gear tables
BULLETPROOF-SHIELD.name: Bulletproof Shield
BULLETPROOF-SHIELD.desc: 10 HP proprios (nao SP); ocupa um braco; sem penalidade de REF/DEX/MOVE.

attackRoll.tieRule: attacker must beat DV; defender wins ties in opposed melee/evasion contexts

meleeCombat.formula: Attacker DEX + Melee/Brawling Skill + 1d10 vs Defender DEX + Evasion + 1d10
meleeCombat.meleeArmorRounding: round up defender armor half ignored; effectiveSP = ceil(SP / 2)

headAimedShot.spotWeaknessOrder: weapon damage + Spot Weakness, subtract SP, then multiply penetrating damage by 2

autofire.spotWeaknessOrder: multiply Autofire damage first, then add Spot Weakness, then subtract SP

rangeDV.note: Do not invent full Range DV Table here. Resolver accepts targetDV or evasionDV from context.

tableSelection.head: Use head table only when attack was an Aimed Shot to the head.
tableSelection.area: Area attacks always use body table.

areaAttackCriticals.ifDamageRollHasTwoOrMoreSixes: every target hit receives a Body Critical Injury

body.name: Dismembered Arm
body.effect: arm lost; drop items held in that arm's hand

body.name: Dismembered Hand
body.effect: hand lost; drop items held in that hand

body.name: Broken Ribs
body.effect: at end of each turn where character moves more than 4m/yd on foot, suffer this Critical Injury's bonus damage directly to HP again

body.name: Broken Arm
body.effect: arm cannot be used; drop items held in that arm's hand

body.name: Foreign Object
body.effect: at end of each turn where character moves more than 4m/yd on foot, suffer this Critical Injury's bonus damage directly to HP again
body.quickFix: First Aid DV13 or Paramedic DV13
body.treatment: Quick Fix removes the injury effect permanently

body.name: Torn Muscle
body.quickFix: First Aid DV13 or Paramedic DV13
body.treatment: Quick Fix removes the injury effect permanently

body.name: Spinal Injury
body.effect: next turn, cannot take an Action but can still take a Move Action

body.name: Dismembered Leg
body.effect: leg lost; MOVE -6, minimum 1; cannot dodge attacks

head.name: Lost Eye
head.effect: eye lost; -4 to Ranged Attacks and Perception checks involving vision

head.name: Damaged Eye
head.effect: -2 to Ranged Attacks and Perception checks involving vision

head.name: Concussion
head.quickFix: First Aid DV13 or Paramedic DV13
head.treatment: Quick Fix removes the injury effect permanently

head.name: Foreign Object
head.effect: at end of each turn where character moves more than 4m/yd on foot, suffer this Critical Injury's bonus damage directly to HP again
head.quickFix: First Aid DV13 or Paramedic DV13
head.treatment: Quick Fix removes the injury effect permanently

head.name: Cracked Skull
head.effect: Aimed Shots to the head multiply penetrating damage by 3 instead of 2

head.name: Damaged Ear
head.effect: if character moves more than 4m/yd on foot in a turn, they cannot take a Move Action on the next turn; also -2 to Perception checks involving hearing

head.name: Lost Ear
head.effect: ear lost; if character moves more than 4m/yd on foot in a turn, they cannot take a Move Action on the next turn; also -4 to Perception checks involving hearing

specialRules: Sets target Strongly On Fire on hit
THERMAL-DAGGER.name: Centurion Essentials Thermal Dagger

effects.value: sets targets Strongly On Fire on hit

THERMAL-DAGGER.desc: adaga termica exotica de excelente qualidade; arma melee media concealable que deixa o alvo Strongly On Fire ao acertar.

NATS-LONG-BARRELED-PISTOL.name: Nat's Long-Barreled Pistol
NATS-LONG-BARRELED-PISTOL.desc: pistola muito pesada de excelente qualidade com cano longo, range table unica e 3 slots de attachment.

E-TACK-RAPID-RESPONDER.name: Pursuit Security E-TACK Rapid Responder

specialRules: treats non-Armor Piercing Ammunition as Armor Piercing
automatically disabled while fewer than 3 bullets are in magazine

E-TACK-RAPID-RESPONDER.desc: pistola media de baixa qualidade com magazine estendido e Stun Bayonet nao removivel; possui burst mode que gasta 3 balas e causa dano como Heavy Pistol.

STUN-BAYONET.name: Stun Bayonet
eligible: All Non-Exotic Ranged Weapons fired with Shoulder Arms

effect.value: firearm can also be wielded as a Stun Baton

effects.value: firearm can also be wielded as a Stun Baton

specialRules: allows firearm to be used as a Stun Baton
STUN-BAYONET.desc: attachment para armas ranged nao exoticas usadas com Shoulder Arms; permite usar a arma como Stun Baton.

SMART-GLOVE.name: CyberDude Smart Glove

effects.value: grants access to Subdermal Grip and installed glove options while worn
2 Cyberarm/Cyberlimb option slots

restrictions: non-finger cyberware options stored in cyberhand or meat hand under the glove are inaccessible while glove is worn
SMART-GLOVE.desc: luva smart sem dedos com Subdermal Grip embutido e 2 slots para opcoes de Cyberarm/Cyberlimb; opcoes ficam acessiveis enquanto a luva e usada.

HIGH-DENSITY-SHIELD.name: High-Density Bulletproof Shield

effects.value: shield with 15 HP; cannot be installed in Popup Shield

HIGH-DENSITY-SHIELD.desc: bulletproof shield com 15 HP; nao pode ser instalado em Popup Shield.

LIGHT-METALGEAR.name: Light Metalgear
LIGHT-METALGEAR.desc: versao leve de Metalgear; SP 16 e penalidade de -3 para REF, DEX e MOVE.

SMART-EARS.name: Smart Ears

effects.value: 2 Cyberaudio Option slots
grants access to non-removable Radio Scanner/Music Player and installed Cyberaudio Options while worn

restrictions: Radio Scanner/Music Player cannot be removed
user can only wear one set of Smart Ears at a time
SMART-EARS.desc: equipamento auditivo com Radio Scanner/Music Player nao removivel e 2 slots para Cyberaudio Options; apenas um conjunto pode ser usado por vez.

FACE-QC.name: Quick Change Faceplate Mount

effects.value: replaces meat face with mount; Faceplate can be installed or uninstalled with an Action

FACE-QC.desc: montagem facial interna para trocar Faceplates com uma Action; vem com uma Faceplate personalizada, e Faceplates extras custam 100eb.

QUICK-DIGITS.name: Rocklin Augmentics Quick Digits

effects.condition: two or more Quick Digits installed; finger-based dexterity task

effects.value: also applies to Language (Sign) if the engine supports that language specialization; otherwise keep as contextual note, not fake skill

specialRules: Can be installed as only piece of cyberware in meat arm
Two or more Quick Digits grant +1 Complimentary Skill Check bonus to listed finger-based dexterity skills
Complimentary Skill bonuses do not stack
QUICK-DIGITS.desc: cyberdedos Rocklin; com dois ou mais instalados, concede +1 como Complimentary Skill Check para tarefas de destreza com dedos nas skills listadas. Nao stacka.

SKYDRIVERS.name: Rocklin Augmentics Skydrivers
specialRules: Count as one item for Cost and Humanity Loss
Do not count as one item for Critical Injuries or repair
Each Cyberleg has 2 Option Slots for Cyberleg or Cyberlimb Options
Each comes with non-removable Jump Boosters
Built-in Jump Boosters cause no Humanity Loss and take no Cyberleg Option Slot
Removing Jump Boosters destroys the Cyberlegs beyond repair

effects.value: built-in Jump Boosters negate jump movement penalty

value.condition: user moved at least 4m/yds this Turn and makes Brawling or Martial Arts Attack against cover using legs

SKYDRIVERS.desc: par de cyberlegs com Jump Boosters embutidos e 2 slots por perna; ataques de Brawling/Martial Arts com as pernas contra cover causam +3d6 se o usuario moveu pelo menos 4m/yds no turno.

CYBERSPINE.name: Sycust Cyberspine

effects.value: can serve as compatible orifice/mount point for Cybersnake

CYBERSPINE.desc: cybercoluna reforcada; bloqueia apenas Spinal Injury e seu bonus de dano, e hardened contra EMP em si mesma, concede +1 em Contortionist e pode servir como ponto compativel para Cybersnake.

CYBER-COND.name: Zetatech CyberConductor

effects.value: up to 3 Cyberdecks
as a Meat Action while Jacked In to a NET Architecture, switch from one installed Cyberdeck to another
when switching, all active programs Derezz, including Black ICE, and user takes 3 HP damage directly

specialRules: Up to three Cyberdecks may be installed
Switching Cyberdecks is a Meat Action while Jacked In
Switching derezzes all active programs including Black ICE
Cyberdecks installed in the CyberConductor do not share Programs or Hardware
Installing or uninstalling a Cyberdeck takes one hour
CYBER-COND.desc: hardware Zetatech que comporta ate 3 cyberdecks; troca como Meat Action enquanto Jacked In, derezza programas ativos e causa 3 HP diretos.

CYBER-COND-INTEGRATED.name: Zetatech CyberConductor, Integrated

effects.value: up to 3 Cyberdecks plus compatible FBC-integrated cyberdecks
switch between connected cyberdecks using CyberConductor without taking the 3 HP damage

specialRules: May only be installed in a Full Body Conversion
User can only have one CyberConductor installed
No 3 HP damage when switching Cyberdecks
Connects other cyberdecks installed as cyberware in the FBC
Cyberdecks installed in the Integrated CyberConductor count as integrated via cyberware into the FBC body
CYBER-COND-INTEGRATED.desc: CyberConductor integrado para FBC; comporta cyberdecks e permite troca sem sofrer 3 HP diretos.

MANTIS-BLADE.name: Mantis Blade

specialRules: does not ignore full armor by default
does not ignore full armor by default
balanceNotes: balanced as a concealable Heavy Melee Cyberweapon
higher cost and HL than Wolvers because it is explicitly hidden/retractable and homebrew
does not ignore armor unless a specific upgrade modifies ablation
MANTIS-BLADE.desc: lamina retratil escondida no braco; funciona como cyberweapon melee pesada exotica, 3d6 ROF 2, usando Melee Weapon.

MONOWIRE.name: Monowire

specialRules: acts like a short flexible whip/line
does not ignore full armor by default
acts like a short flexible whip/line
does not ignore full armor by default
balanceNotes: 4d6 is balanced by ROF 1
no automatic armor ignore
reach is short and must be supported by combat context
MONOWIRE.desc: fio monomolecular retratil usado como chicote curto; cyberweapon melee muito pesada exotica, 4d6 ROF 1, usando Melee Weapon.

COMBAT-TAIL.name: Combat Tail

specialRules: can attack while hands are occupied
attack still consumes normal Attack Action

effects.condition: balance, climbing, hanging, resisting falls, or tail-assisted movement

specialRules: can attack while hands are occupied
attack still consumes normal Attack Action
balanceNotes: hands-free attack is strong, so it is not concealable and does not grant extra action
uses the normal action economy
COMBAT-TAIL.desc: cauda cybernetica de combate; arma melee pesada exotica 3d6 ROF 2, pode atacar com as maos ocupadas, mas nao concede acao extra.

GORILLA-ARMS.name: Gorilla Arms

specialRules: treats BODY as +2 only for Gorilla Arms raw strength checks and Gorilla Arms brawling damage scale
does not satisfy Linear Frame requirements

effects.condition: raw strength only, including lifting, pushing, forcing doors, bending bars, breaking objects, holding someone, or similar GM-approved strength exertion

effects.value: BODY is treated as +2 only for raw strength contexts and Gorilla Arms damage scale; this never changes HP, Death Save, Wound Threshold, Linear Frame requirements, or actual BODY.

specialRules: treats BODY as +2 only for Gorilla Arms raw strength checks and Gorilla Arms brawling damage scale
does not satisfy Linear Frame requirements
balanceNotes: not a real BODY increase
no HP increase
no Death Save increase
paired cyberarm requirement prevents cheap stacking
bonus is limited to raw strength contexts
GORILLA-ARMS.desc: par de cyberarms reforcados; concede +2 em Athletics apenas para forca bruta e usa BODY +2 somente para dano dos proprios Gorilla Arms, sem alterar BODY real, HP ou Death Save.

ENH-HYD-RAM.name: Hydraulic Ram
specialRules: adds +3d6 only against cover or objects
balanceNotes: keeps the upgrade cinematic without increasing character damage
ENH-HYD-RAM.desc: pistoes hidraulicos para Gorilla Arms; adiciona +3d6 apenas contra cover ou objetos, nunca contra personagens.

ENH-PNEU-ACT.name: Pneumatic Actuation
specialRules: when Gorilla Arms causes a Critical Injury, add +5 direct HP damage
this extra damage is not multiplied by headshot and does not ablate armor
balanceNotes: mirrors the logic of Critical Injury bonus damage but only on Gorilla Arms criticals
ENH-PNEU-ACT.desc: atuadores pneumaticos para Gorilla Arms; quando o ataque causa Critical Injury, adiciona +5 HP direto sem ablar armor.

ENH-TUNG-REIN.name: Tungsten Reinforcement
specialRules: user may choose reinforcedFast 3d6 ROF 2 or reinforcedHeavy 4d6 ROF 1
does not stack with BODY-based Gorilla Arms damage; selected mode replaces normal Gorilla Arms damage profile
balanceNotes: gives mode flexibility but not free extra damage
ENH-TUNG-REIN.desc: reforco de tungstenio para Gorilla Arms; permite escolher modo 3d6 ROF 2 ou 4d6 ROF 1.

ENH-DBL-EDGE.name: Double-Edged Actuator
specialRules: when Mantis Blade causes a Critical Injury, roll twice on the applicable Critical Injury table and choose one result
balanceNotes: increases critical control, not base damage
ENH-DBL-EDGE.desc: atuador duplo para Mantis Blade; ao causar Critical Injury, role duas vezes na tabela e escolha um resultado.

ENH-MONO-EDG.name: Monomolecular Edge
specialRules: Mantis Blade ablates 1 additional SP when damage penetrates armor
does not apply if no damage penetrates
balanceNotes: sharpness is represented as extra ablation, not armor bypass
ENH-MONO-EDG.desc: fio monomolecular para Mantis Blade; quando o dano atravessa armor, causa +1 ablation adicional.

ENH-BARB-LIN.name: Barbed Line
specialRules: when Monowire causes a Critical Injury, roll three times on the applicable Critical Injury table and choose one result
balanceNotes: high critical control balanced by Monowire ROF 1 and GM approval
ENH-BARB-LIN.desc: farpas microscopicas para Monowire; ao causar Critical Injury, role tres vezes na tabela e escolha um resultado.

ENH-ELECTRO.name: Electro-Line

specialRules: no full stun system implemented yet
does not trigger Critical Injury unless GM overrides
balanceNotes: utility/control option, not a damage upgrade
ENH-ELECTRO.desc: modulo eletrocondutivo para Monowire; permite modo nao letal 3d6 ROF 1, sem Critical Injury por padrao.

ENH-THERMAL.name: Thermal Edge
specialRules: Monowire ablates 1 additional SP when damage penetrates armor
does not set targets on fire by default
balanceNotes: extra ablation but no additional damage and no automatic fire condition
ENH-THERMAL.desc: fio termico para Monowire; quando o dano atravessa armor, causa +1 ablation adicional e fica visivelmente aquecido enquanto ativo.
